title: Who is Tiana Musarra? Everything to know about the influencer making headlines at Streamer University 2026
summary_full: Tiana Musarra is a lifestyle influencer, model and Twitch streamer who gained wider recognition after joining Kai Cenat’s Streamer University 2026. She previously built an audience through fashion, fitness and GRWM content and has over 123,000 Twitch followers. Her name recently drew extra attention after Josh “YourRAGE” mentioned her during a heated on-stream call with DDG.
